response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have one brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of recent hands-on C++ development, STL usage, multi-threading, MQTT/REST in industrial contexts, or IEC 62443 compliance — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven ability to build event-driven and distributed systems
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols (OPC UA, Modbus)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded or high-performance systems
